response.justification: Candidate has roughly 15 years of solid full-stack software craftsmanship across multiple domains, but the role specifically targets a Principal/Director-level AI strategist with recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products/platforms. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators) without evidence of building AI products at scale, advising strategic customers on AI adoption, or operating at director-level technical leadership.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product or platform leadership
No evidence of director-level IC influence or advising strategic customers
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth beyond AWS CDK usage
